allow: PowerShell($user = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "User"\); $machine = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "Machine"\); Write-Output "USER-LEVEL: $\(if \($user\) { 'SET \(len=' + $user.Length + '\)' } else { 'not set' }\)"; Write-Output "MACHINE-LEVEL: $\(if \($machine\) { 'SET \(len=' + $machine.Length + '\)' } else { 'not set' }\)"; Write-Output "---OTHER RELATED VARS---"; Get-ChildItem Env: | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'ANTHROPIC|CLAUDE' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \($_.Name + ' = <redacted len=' + $_.Value.Length + '>'\) })

PowerShell($user = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "User"\); $machine = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "Machine"\); $process = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "Process"\); Write-Output "USER scope:    $\(if \($user\) { 'SET \(len=' + $user.Length + ', prefix=' + $user.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(8,$user.Length\)\) + '\)' } else { 'not set' }\)"; Write-Output "MACHINE scope: $\(if \($machine\) { 'SET \(len=' + $machine.Length + ', prefix=' + $machine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(8,$machine.Length\)\) + '\)' } else { 'not set' }\)"; Write-Output "PROCESS scope: $\(if \($process\) { 'SET \(len=' + $process.Length + ', prefix=' + $process.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(8,$process.Length\)\) + '\)' } else { 'not set' }\)")

Bash(psql -h localhost -U postgres -d weldon_trader -c "SELECT id, name, length\(rules_text\) as rules_len, substring\(rules_text from 1 for 600\) as rules_preview FROM rulesets WHERE name = 'Base RSI to Evolve' LIMIT 1;")

Bash(psql -h localhost -U postgres -d weldon_trader -c "SELECT symbol, timeframe, signal_type, confidence, substring\(reason from 1 for 250\) as reason_preview, created_at FROM signals WHERE created_at > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '2 hours' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 8;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d weldon_trader -c "SELECT id, name, length\(rules_text\) as rules_len FROM rulesets WHERE name = 'Base RSI to Evolve' LIMIT 1;")
